goal: Verify BUG-016 (deck-unlock popup) and BUG-017 (3rd-card glow) live and sync their open-bugs.md records
done: Confirmed BUG-016 issues #1 (auth gate) and #2 (timing) already fixed in deployed bundle (4a49e3f); only issue #3 (deck mismatch from setActiveDeck without repaint) remains and is latent. Confirmed BUG-017 selection logic + glow CSS are correct in Chrome; the deferred-paint symptom is iOS-Safari-only and does not reproduce headless. Updated all three records (016/017/021) in docs/open-bugs.md.
root_cause: BUG-016: auth gate now at js/reading.js:2781 (if currentUser) gates showDeckRewardPopup, popup fires post-renderDailyDetails — both shipped 4a49e3f. Issue #3 latent: js/deck-reward.js:278 setActiveDeck has no card-back repaint. BUG-017: is-selected + purple box-shadow apply correctly to all 3 picks; symptom is a GPU compositing deferral specific to iOS Safari.
verified: chrome-devtools-mcp: deployed reading.js contains the 'const currentUser = await getCurrentUser()' auth gate
chrome-devtools-mcp iPhone 390x844: 3-card story selection -> all 3 slots get is-selected + box-shadow, paints in Chrome (screenshot)
notes: Doc-only commit. Pairs with the BUG-021-tail fix (1c866d8) shipped same day. BUG-016 priority downgraded High->Low; BUG-017 needs a real-device compositing-nudge pass, not a logic fix.
